title: centaurea × ludovici
intro: Centaurea × ludovici, also known as the William's Button or Centaurea × ludoviciana, is a hybrid perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) with showy, fragrant flowers. It is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × ludovici include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Centaurea × ludovici can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
